description_long: This is a life-sized bust of a man mounted on a tall, rectangular stone pedestal. The bust is sculpted in a realistic style, showing detailed facial features and a formal attire, likely representing a notable historical figure. The pedestal is inscribed with Cyrillic text, including a name and the years 1919-1944, and features a small emblem or crest above the inscription. The entire sculpture is set on a square stone base, which is surrounded by a patch of mossy ground, suggesting outdoor placement. The stone surfaces are weathered, with visible texture and some discoloration, especially near the base. The overall impression is of a commemorative monument, likely honoring an individual of local or national significance.
description: A realistic bust of a man on a tall, inscribed stone pedestal, set on a mossy stone base. The sculpture appears weathered and commemorative.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed bust, Cyrillic inscription, and emblem on the pedestal.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the bust and the plain side of the pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the bust and the unadorned pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side view with the bust's profile and the plain pedestal side visible.
attribute_subject_matter: bust of a man with inscribed pedestal
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is installed outdoors on a mossy stone base, likely in a park or public green space.
